title: Frontend Polish & a11y — Implementation Plan
summary: TDD implementation plan for shipping five medium-severity frontend and accessibility fixes: broken settings link, paginator keyboard access, plan toggle double-click guard, multi-conversation lead transcript banner, and modal form reset on cancel.
notes: Manifest-declared DOC; TDD-shaped implementation plan with Task 0 verification pass, Tasks 1–5 by finding (each with failing test or verification step), Task 6 closure (browser smoke + Pint + /simplify×2 + PR). No architectural decisions or locked status—this is a procedural guide for execution. Codebase has no JS test runner; browser smoke via Playwright is the primary verification surface. Cross-references both spec and individual component paths.
